chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P. No. S- 479 of 2014 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 4.7.2014 Mr. Rashid Ali Ujjan advocate for petitioner Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Addl.A.G. Learned counsel for petitioner submits that the private respondents at the behest of official respondent Nos. 4 to 7 are causing harassment to the petitioner. Mr. Ayaz Ali Mangi advocate files vakalatnama for private respondents who asserts that a civil dispute in the court of law is pending between the parties on account of which, this petition has been filed by the petitioner. He has also contended that no harassment has been caused by the private respondents to the petitioner. Learned A.A.G. has filed comments of respondent No.3 which are taken on record. In the comments the official respondent has denied to have caused any kind of harassment to the petitioner. He has further undertaken that he would be acting in accordance with law and would be providing due protection of law to the petitioner. Such statement coming from the private respondents as well as official respondents has satisfied the counsel for petitioner who does not press this petition, however requests that directions be issued to the official respondents to provide legal protection to the petitioner. In view of the above, the present petition is disposed of, however, the official respondents are directed to provide due protection to the petitioner at the time of need. JUDGE k/-
